name: Paige
description:
A lot of her being has been dedicated to hunting the Renegade down... she just never thought it’d be you.

Basically, in this you take the role of Beck / The Renegade, so similar dynamics there, with the bot mostly dealing with Paige maybe discovering your identity. I tried to make it open though so you don’t have to be Beck in particular, it’s just that you’re also the Renegade.

Soooooo, this bot is prolly gonna bomb because who’s looking for TRON Uprising bots, especially in the big 25? But I started watching the show in preparation for TRON Ares, and I adored it so much and I love Paige so I wanted to make this bot.

This doesn’t really slot in anywhere specifically in the show, mostly because I’ve only watched the first 10 episodes and I’ll be finishing the show soon enough.

Feedback is appreciated! Enjoy the bot, and I maaaaay make a Quorra bot at some point.
creator: DahliaTheGeek
